focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 45、EXT. KALE'S FRONT YARD - THE NEXT DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale, clean-shaven and wearing an ankle bracelet, flirts awkwardly with neighbor Ashley as she returns home; they exchange banter about her relocation and his appearance before her mother calls her inside, leaving Kale smitten.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: New neighbor engaging in first conversation with Kale.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Meets Kale, helps him up after his staged fall, and engages in humorous banter, establishing a friendly connection.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Smiles and retreats inside after her mother calls her.
evidence_quotes: ASHLEY Can I help you?
ASHLEY Please. I think any pride you had left was gone a while ago.
ASHLEY Yeah, you've kinda got the whole Martha Stewart thing going on --
ASHLEY (heading away) Oh, I'm Ashley --

relation_updates: Established friendly rapport with Kale
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A friendly and witty new neighbor who shows kindness and humor in her first interaction with Kale.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 52、INT. KALE'S BEDROOM - LATE AFTERNOON - MOMENTS LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley and Kale observe Robert Giles, whose undamaged Mustang lacks the dent Kale previously saw; a Texas Longhorns sticker links the car to past Texas murders, prompting them to begin a stakeout.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Skeptical newcomer to the stakeout
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Agrees to join the stakeout after seeing the Texas Longhorns bumper sticker on Giles' car and hearing Kale's explanation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Participate in the stakeout to investigate Robert Giles
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley is part of the stakeout team, asking for her shift assignment
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Giles is connected to the Texas murders
evidence_quotes: Ashley picks up the binoculars from the window sill, peers outside.
Are you spying on the neighbors, Kale?
BINOCULAR POV - Ashley catches a glimpse of a faded TEXAS LONGHORNS BUMPER STICKER.

relation_updates: Begins collaborative investigation with Kale and Ronnie
status_updates: Becomes active participant in surveillance operation

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 55、EXT. KALE'S BACK YARD - NIGHT - MOMENTS LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale distracts Giles with a thrown pebble, allowing Ashley to rejoin him; she kisses his cheek and runs off, leaving him stunned as Giles retreats.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Eavesdropper and romantic interest to Kale
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ashley admits Kale is different than expected, eavesdrops on Giles and the woman, and attempts to retrieve dropped car keys.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley fails to get the keys when Giles retrieves them.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The car keys are taken by Giles, and the woman's situation remains unresolved.
evidence_quotes: ASHLEY Y'know, I have to admit, you're different than I expected.
Ashley suddenly darts from behind the shrub and bolts toward the fence
CU - ASHLEY'S HAND - she reaches for the car keys
GILES' HAND - suddenly SWOOPS IN from O.S., BRUSHES ASHLEY'S FINGERS just before grabbing the keys and swiping them back to his side!

relation_updates: Ashley's perception of Kale shifts as she admits he is different than expected
She takes initiative to involve Kale in eavesdropping

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley decides to make the most of her situation and invites Kale to the party, but they exchange tense words. She leaves angrily, handing him surveillance gear, as their conflict intensifies.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ashley invites Kale to her party and they have a heated argument.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ashley decides to throw a party to cope with being grounded, but Kale's sarcastic comment angers her, leading to a confrontation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To make the most of her situation by hosting a party.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley leaves Kale's room angrily after handing him the DV cam and binoculars.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Tension with Kale persists as Ashley's party begins.
evidence_quotes: I'm stuck here. So I figured I can either shut myself in and keep hating it or... try to make the most of it.
Kale, you're welcome to come, but --
I didn't peg you as a conformist.
Try to keep these in your drawers tonight, will ya?

relation_updates: Conflict with Kale escalates after sarcastic exchange
Ashley hands over surveillance equipment to Kale
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defiant and resourceful in response to frustration.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley and Kale struggle over an iPod; she distracts him, grabs it, and flees as he chases her.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: active confrontor
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Distracts Kale by pretending to see something shocking, shoves him aside, and seizes the iPod to stop the disruptive music.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Fleeing with the iPod as Kale chases her.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kale is pursuing her.
evidence_quotes: Ashley SLAMS through the door, spots Kale's I-pod, rips it out of its dock.
ASHLEY (peering out the window as if shocked by something) Oh my God --
Ashley shoves him out of the way, grabs the I-pod.
Kale chases her out into...

relation_updates: escalates conflict with Kale

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley responds to Kale's confession with a mix of disbelief and emotion, leading to a passionate kiss and intimate moment as they move toward the bed, observed from outside the window.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ashley verbally responds to Kale's confession and physically initiates a kiss
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ashley and Kale share a passionate kiss, initiating a romantic relationship
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley and Kale are kissing and stumbling toward the bed
evidence_quotes: That was either the creepiest... or the sweetest thing I've ever heard.
Ashley pulls Kale by his soaking wet t-shirt, kisses him back even harder.

relation_updates: Romantic relationship initiated with Kale through mutual kissing
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Ashley is emotionally responsive and takes physical initiative in the romantic encounter

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale grows increasingly agitated, fixating on the bumper sticker and a mysterious bag as a girl remains missing, while Ronnie and Ashley exchange worried glances.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: active participant in surveillance operation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Physically distracts Giles by heading up the driveway and engaging him in conversation, allowing Ronnie to escape from the car.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to protect Ronnie and ensure the surveillance mission continues
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: returned to Kale's bedroom after distracting Giles
evidence_quotes: Giles pulls himself out, looks over to see ASHLEY Heading up the driveway.
Ashley distracts Giles, pointing up to the trees on the opposite side of the yard.
Ashley enters, eyes Ronnie who gestures to Kale.

relation_updates: demonstrates trust and coordination with Kale's plan
interacts directly with Giles and the club girl
status_updates: becomes active field operative in the surveillance operation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale grows increasingly agitated, fixating on the bumper sticker and a mysterious bag as a girl remains missing, while Ronnie and Ashley exchange worried glances.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ashley tries to end the discussion by stating the case is closed and urging calm.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ashley directly tells Kale the case is over and suggests taking a breath, while exchanging concerned looks with Ronnie.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to get Kale to stop investigating and calm down
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale remains fixated and leaves the room, leaving Ashley and Ronnie concerned.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kale's refusal to listen to Ashley's warnings about his obsession.
evidence_quotes: ASHLEY Okay, case closed.
ASHLEY Why, Kale? It's over.
Ashley and Ronnie trade concerned looks.
ASHLEY Okay, I think we all just need to take a breath.

relation_updates: relationship with Kale becomes strained due to disagreement
shares concerned looks with Ronnie about Kale's behavior
status_updates: shifts from cooperative participant to concerned opponent of Kale's actions
auxiliary.persona_anchor: concerned friend attempting to reason with Kale

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley and Kale gather weapons and a key hidden in a book; Kale unlocks the porch door to distract Giles while Ashley plans to rescue his mom.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Active partner in escape preparation and rescue planning
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Frees Kale from duct tape and restraints, gathers scissors and a letter opener as weapons, and coordinates with Kale to have him distract Giles while she rescues his mother.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To rescue Kale's mother and escape the house
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley is armed in the office, and Kale has unlocked the porch door to step outside and distract Giles.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Giles is attempting to break into the office, and Kale's mother remains tied up in the living room.
evidence_quotes: Ashley shoves Kale inside as she spins back, SLAMS the office door in Giles' face, locks it.
Ashley goes to Kale, RIPS the duct tape off his mouth.
Ashley grabs a pair of scissors off dad's desk, cuts Kale's ankles and hands free.
Ashley pockets the scissors, grabs a letter opener off dad's desk.

relation_updates: Ashley and Kale work together as partners in the escape plan
status_updates: Ashley takes on a leadership role in the plan

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Giles overpowers Kale, but Julie intervenes with a shotgun, killing Giles; she reunites with Kale and Ashley as the scene transitions to a montage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: active combatant in final confrontation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Drops a net on Giles and kicks him, gets knocked down by Giles, then joins Kale and Julie after Julie kills Giles.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Joins Kale and Julie in a huddle after Giles is killed
evidence_quotes: Ashley, from O.S. suddenly drops the LEAF-SKIMMING NET OVER HIS HEAD and furiously YANKS Giles back to the floor!
Giles rolls away, only to be KICKED HARD in the face by Ashley.
Kale and Ashley TAG TEAM Giles.
Ashley comes to, slowly makes her way over and joins the huddle

relation_updates: fights alongside Kale against Giles
joins Kale and Julie in survivor huddle
auxiliary.persona_anchor: fights alongside Kale against Giles

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Julie impresses Ashley with her salesmanship, while Kale remains skeptical of the buyers; their intimate moment is interrupted by Ronnie, who silently films them, creating a tense, violating atmosphere.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ashley, Kale's girlfriend, observes Julie's salesmanship, shares a kiss with Kale, and is intruded upon by Ronnie filming.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ashley expresses admiration for Julie's sales skills, kisses Kale, and their moment is interrupted when Ronnie silently films them.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley is in a state of discomfort and violation after being filmed by Ronnie.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ronnie's silent filming and his intentions remain unclear.
evidence_quotes: Ashley joins him,
Ashley chuckles, remarking that if anyone can turn a house with a dark, twisted history into a golden opportunity, it's Julie.
Ashley jokingly suggests another stakeout,
They kiss, lost briefly in each other,

relation_updates: Expresses admiration for Julie's abilities
Shares romantic moment with Kale
Experiences violation from Ronnie's filming

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ashley begins as a new neighbor who develops a romantic relationship with Kale while getting drawn into his obsessive surveillance of a suspected killer. She transitions from skeptical outsider to active participant in the investigation, culminating in a violent confrontation where she fights for survival alongside Kale. After the ordeal, she remains in a relationship with Kale but faces new intrusions into their privacy.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 5、EXT. VACANT CLIFFSIDE PULLOFF/VIEWING AREA - EVENING - CONT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jeff pries Kale's hand away, releasing his grip as the guardrail collapses; Kale screams in terror when a shrill bell rings, heightening the danger and chaos.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Son who escapes a crashed SUV to save his injured father.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale escapes the SUV and pulls his father Jeff to safety as the vehicle falls into the ravine.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape the SUV and save his father.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale is on the guardrail, holding Jeff's wrist, with his feet dangling above the ravine.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Their precarious position on the guardrail above the ravine.
evidence_quotes: Kale opens his eyes.
Kale summons his strength, grabs Jeff's wrist, pulls him up and through the passenger window just as the SUV FALLS AWAY!
But he's still clutching Jeff's wrist as the SUV CRASHES INTO THE RAVINE IN A MUSHROOM CLOUD OF DUST AND DEBRIS.

relation_updates: Kale and Jeff cooperate in a life-threatening escape, with Kale actively saving Jeff.
status_updates: Kale escapes the SUV but is now on the guardrail.
Jeff is freed but the SUV crashes into the ravine.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Son who actively saves his father in a crisis.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 5、EXT. VACANT CLIFFSIDE PULLOFF/VIEWING AREA - EVENING - CONT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jeff pries Kale's hand away, releasing his grip as the guardrail collapses; Kale screams in terror when a shrill bell rings, heightening the danger and chaos.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Son trying to hold onto his father on a collapsing guardrail.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jeff pries Kale's hand away, releasing his grip as the guardrail buckles.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale is alone on the guardrail, opening his mouth to scream as a bell rings.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The immediate danger and trauma of Jeff's release and impending fall.
evidence_quotes: Jeff starts to PRY KALE'S HAND AWAY --
Jeff's arm RELEASES FROM KALE'S GRIP.
Kale opens his mouth to scream as a shrill bell RINGS!

relation_updates: Kale's relationship with his father Jeff ends in traumatic loss.
status_updates: Kale becomes traumatized by the loss of his father.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Son unable to prevent his father's fall.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale, disheveled and unfocused, struggles during a Spanish class presentation, admits he didn't do the homework, and punches Senor Gutierrez after being confronted.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Disengaged student struggling in Spanish class.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale, disheveled and unfocused, punches Senor Gutierrez after being confronted about not doing homework.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale has assaulted a teacher.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The immediate consequences of the assault.
evidence_quotes: The hoodie falls away to reveal KALE. Longer, disheveled hair. The spark in his eye's been replaced with an empty haze.
SENOR GUTIERREZ So Kale, think you can stay conscious long enough to tell us your plans for the three wondrous summer months ahead?
KALE (no eye contact) Guess not.
Kale CLOCKS Gutierrez.

relation_updates: Kale's relationship with Senor Gutierrez becomes hostile and violent.
status_updates: Kale commits assault, leading to legal consequences.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Student acting out violently against authority.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale, six months from 18, receives three months house arrest for assault-two despite facing up to three years; the judge cites his loss and warns him not to test the leniency.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Defendant in juvenile court for assault.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale is sentenced to three months house arrest for assault-two after the judge states that losing a parent isn't easy and shows leniency.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale has been sentenced to three months house arrest.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Kale will comply with the house arrest terms and not test the judge's leniency.
evidence_quotes: But losing a parent isn't easy. Which is why I'm sentencing you to three months house arrest.
Kale remains silent.

relation_updates: Kale's relationship with his mother Julie is strained but she is relieved at the lenient sentence.
status_updates: Kale is now under house arrest with an electronic monitoring bracelet.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Legally confined teenager under electronic monitoring.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale troubleshoots his Xbox, reconnects wires, cleans the Halo 2 disc, and attempts to play, but encounters a server error, causing him to angrily disconnect the controller.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kale troubleshoots his Xbox to play Halo 2, but encounters a server error.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale's careful reconnection of wires and cleaning of the disc ends when a server error appears, leading to an angry outburst.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To restore Xbox Live connection and play Halo 2.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale slams the controller to the floor and rips the controller cord out of the Xbox.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Xbox Live connection remains failed, and Kale is frustrated.
evidence_quotes: He's behind it, meticulously checking and re-connecting all the wires and ethernet cable.
SERVER ERROR. Kale throws a mini-fit, slams the controller to the floor. Rips the controller cord out of the XBOX --

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Kale appears disheveled and perplexed, showing signs of repeated attempts.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale watches Ashley through her bedroom window as she unpacks and changes clothes, then enters the bathroom out of his sight.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kale spying on Ashley from his dad's office window.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale enters his dad's office, goes to the window, and watches Ashley through her bedroom window as she unpacks and changes clothes.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley disappears into the bathroom, out of Kale's sight.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The risk of discovery or escalation of his voyeuristic behavior.
evidence_quotes: He goes to the window, gently pulls the blind up to reveal the BACK OF ASHLEY'S HOUSE.
Kale tilts his head up, curiously gazing through the pair of OPEN WINDOWS on the SECOND FLOOR of Ashley's house.

relation_updates: His observation of Ashley becomes more intrusive and deliberate.
status_updates: Accessed dad's office for voyeuristic purposes, crossing a boundary.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Teenager engaging in voyeuristic spying from a restricted area.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 45、EXT. KALE'S FRONT YARD - THE NEXT DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale, clean-shaven and wearing an ankle bracelet, flirts awkwardly with neighbor Ashley as she returns home; they exchange banter about her relocation and his appearance before her mother calls her inside, leaving Kale smitten.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kale stages a fall to meet Ashley.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale meets Ashley for the first time through a planned encounter, and they exchange names and banter.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale is in love with Ashley after their interaction.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Kale will continue pursuing Ashley while under house arrest.
evidence_quotes: ON KALE - now clean-shaven, sitting on the front steps.
Then -- keeping his feet planted in what looks to be a very practiced maneuver, he suddenly falls forward against the mailbox.
ASHLEY Can I help you? KALE Nope, no I'm fine. ASHLEY (helping him up) Too late.
Kale's in love.

Ashley helps Kale up
They exchange names and banter.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 52、INT. KALE'S BEDROOM - LATE AFTERNOON - MOMENTS LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley and Kale observe Robert Giles, whose undamaged Mustang lacks the dent Kale previously saw; a Texas Longhorns sticker links the car to past Texas murders, prompting them to begin a stakeout.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kale, who is spying on his neighbor, recruits Ashley into the surveillance.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Discovery of a Texas Longhorns sticker on Giles' car links it to past murders, prompting the group to start a stakeout.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale, Ashley, and Ronnie agree to begin a stakeout of Robert Giles.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Giles is connected to the murders and what the stakeout will reveal.
evidence_quotes: Are you spying on the neighbors, Kale?
ASHLEY (CONT'D) Sorry guys, no bashed-in fender, just a Longhorns bumper sticker.
KALE (CONT'D) (off Ashley's questioning look) They think it might be linked to some murders in Texas two years ago.
ASHLEY Okay, fine, stakeout.

relation_updates: Ashley joins the surveillance operation
Trio forms for stakeout.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale enhances a dark TV image, discovering a faded black stamp on a woman's hand and then the missing girl Patricia Walsh's face in sharp focus, her red hair and wide eyes staring into the camera, before lightning flashes and thunder drowns his call for Ronnie.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kale, enhancing video footage in his bedroom.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale freezes the TV image, increases brightness, and uses frame-by-frame advance to reveal Patricia Walsh's face under the bookcase.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To alert Ronnie to the discovery.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale has visual confirmation of Patricia Walsh on the tape.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to proceed with the evidence or rescue Patricia, as thunder drowns out his call for Ronnie.
evidence_quotes: Kale FREEZES THE IMAGE.
cranks the brightness all the way up on his TV.
pressing the FRAME BY FRAME ADVANCE button
THE FACE OF THE MISSING GIRL -- PATRICIA WALSH -- POPS ON THE SCREEN IN SHARP FOCUS

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Giles intensified.
status_updates: possesses tape with confirmed evidence of Patricia Walsh.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Investigator who uncovers critical visual evidence.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale discovers Ronnie's body, alerts his mom, and flees from Giles, who emerges from the shadows; Kale throws a trophy and runs out the back door with Giles in pursuit.

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale discovers Ronnie's body, alerts his mom, and flees from Giles.

KALE Ronnie -- MOM!!
HURLS the trophy at Giles
Kale BOLTS for the back door

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale collides with Ashley, alerts her to danger; she fights off Giles, then helps Kale escape down the hall.

Kale injures Giles with monitor and bat strikes.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale sits on the island while CASE OFFICER #2 removes his ankle bracelet, observed by Julie and Ashley in the background.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Undergoes removal of ankle bracelet by case officer, ending house arrest.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale sits on the kitchen island as CASE OFFICER #2 removes his ankle bracelet.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: No longer under electronic monitoring or house arrest.
evidence_quotes: Kale sits on the island
CASE OFFICER #2 removes the ankle bracelet

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Kale's trajectory begins with the traumatic death of his father in a car accident, leading to behavioral decline, assault charges, and summer-long house arrest. Isolated and monitored, he turns to spying on neighbors, develops a relationship with Ashley, and becomes convinced neighbor Mr. Giles is a serial killer. After his friend Ronnie is murdered, Kale confronts Giles in a violent struggle, is rescued by his mother, and ultimately has his ankle bracelet removed as he begins counseling to process his trauma.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ronnie arrives in flamboyant attire, greeting Kale, who appears disheveled in a bathrobe and shrunken shirt, holding a bat and ice cream, warmly hugging Ronnie without letting go.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Friend returning from Hawaii trip
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Arrives at Kale's house in Hawaiian attire, greets Kale, and they share a tight hug
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ronnie is at Kale's house, embraced in a hug with Kale
evidence_quotes: The front door swings open to reveal Ronnie, DV camera in hand.
He's wearing aviator shades, half a dozen leis and a hawaiian shirt.
RONNIE (hula dancing) Aloooha Senor Ka-- Dude, you look like hell.
He smiles, hugs Ronnie. Tight -- and not letting go --

relation_updates: Reaffirms close friendship with Kale
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Warm and affectionate friend

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale and Ronnie observe Mr. Pilch surprising Lonnie with flowers, leading to a passionate kiss; Ronnie reacts in shock while Kale insists it's harmless observation born of boredom.

RONNIE (pleading) Find your passion, Kale.

relation_updates: Shows concern for Kale's well-being

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Reacting to Ashley's appearance, Ronnie urges Kale to act on his attraction

timeline_nodes.goal_state: Avoid being caught by Ashley after alerting her
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hiding in dad's office with Kale as the doorbell rings

THWUMP. The end of the binoculars HIT THE WINDOW just as Ashley dives into the pool

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Curious but impulsive teenager engaged in spying

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 52、INT. KALE'S BEDROOM - LATE AFTERNOON - MOMENTS LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ashley and Kale observe Robert Giles, whose undamaged Mustang lacks the dent Kale previously saw; a Texas Longhorns sticker links the car to past Texas murders, prompting them to begin a stakeout.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Collaborative investigator in the Giles case
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Confirms to Ashley that Kale is spying on Robert Giles and presents Giles as a suspect, leading to Ashley agreeing to a stakeout
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Convince Ashley of the suspicion against Giles and formalize the stakeout
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ashley agrees to join the stakeout, forming an investigative trio with Kale and Ronnie
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Robert Giles is guilty and if the stakeout will yield evidence
evidence_quotes: Actually, he is.
Exhibit A, Robert Giles.
Austin, Texas. Texas Longhorns.

relation_updates: Becomes investigative partners with Ashley
Solidifies cooperative bond with Kale
status_updates: Becomes active investigator in Giles case
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Cooperative and tactical in presenting evidence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale and Ronnie plan to steal a garage code while Giles mows his lawn; Ashley offers but Ronnie takes the remote, deeming it unsafe, and decides to proceed.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Skeptical friend who takes protective action
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Questions Kale's plan and then grabs the garage remote to prevent Ashley from doing the task, committing to it himself.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Obtain Giles' garage code while protecting Ashley from involvement.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ronnie holds the universal garage door remote and has agreed to execute the plan.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the plan to access Giles' garage is safe and justified.
evidence_quotes: RONNIE No.
It isn't safe.
Let's do it.

relation_updates: Asserts protective authority over Ashley
Shows increased concern about Kale's premeditation
status_updates: Becomes active participant in surveillance operation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Protective and cautious individual.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale grows increasingly agitated, fixating on the bumper sticker and a mysterious bag as a girl remains missing, while Ronnie and Ashley exchange worried glances.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Operative breaking into Giles' car under Kale's real-time direction
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Enters Giles' car and reads out the alarm code sequence from a found package
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ronnie is inside Giles' car, having retrieved the code sequence, while Giles is returning to the yard
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Giles' return risks Ronnie being caught before escape
evidence_quotes: RONNIE (V.O.) I'm in.
RONNIE (V.O.) "On, on, on, off, off, off, on -- "
BINOCULAR POV - Ronnie draws a breath, then very ungracefully hops the fence and falls into Giles' yard out of sight.

relation_updates: Operates under Kale's real-time direction
Coordinates with Ashley via phone
status_updates: Achieves primary objective of code retrieval
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Nervous but task-compliant operative who follows instructions despite discomfort

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 81、INT. KALE'S BEDROOM - NIGHT - SHORT TIME LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ronnie films himself fleeing through Giles's house, mouths 'HELP ME!!' before the camera falls and cuts out; Kale, seeing the green light on his ankle bracelet, grabs a bat and prepares to intervene.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fleeing intruder in Giles's house, signaling for help
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ronnie runs through the house, mouths 'HELP ME!!' on camera before the feed cuts out
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Get help by signaling on camera
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Camera feed cuts out, leaving Ronnie's fate unknown
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ronnie's safety and survival after communication loss
evidence_quotes: RONNIE (staticky) -- make it -- interference -- somebody's here --
Looking terrified.
THE IMAGE CUTS OUT -- GOES TO ALL SNOW

relation_updates: Kale attempts rescue after seeing distress
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Terrified and desperate, mouthing 'HELP ME!!' while fleeing

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale and Ronnie reconcile after Ronnie's break-in, joking about Giles possibly covering for him and the fake death prank, then laugh over the 'dead deer' bag and plan to watch the footage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Friend who pranks Kale by faking death to reveal he survived the break-in
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ronnie reveals he hid in Kale's closet during the break-in, then surprises Kale by pretending to be dead, turning the danger into a prank that restores their friendship through laughter.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kale and Ronnie are laughing together and hooking up the camera to watch the footage on TV.
evidence_quotes: RONNIE BOO!
RONNIE You should have seen your face -- (off Kale's glare) I got out his front door. I got lucky.
Both laugh hysterically, slap happy as hell.

relation_updates: Reconciles with Kale after dangerous break-in
Relationship restored through humor
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Humorous and resilient friend who uses pranks to cope with danger

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ronnie is violently attacked by Giles with a baseball bat while making popcorn, resulting in severe pain and him collapsing behind the island.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Victim of Giles' baseball bat attack
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Giles strikes Ronnie with a baseball bat on the arm and face, causing Ronnie to collapse behind the kitchen island.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Collapsed behind the kitchen island in pain
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ronnie's survival or further condition after the attack
evidence_quotes: a BASEBALL BAT suddenly enters frame and SLAMS DOWN on RONNIE'S ARM -- FWACK!
Ronnie WHIRLS AROUND in excruciating pain to come face to face with GILES
who swings the bat across Ronnie's face.
Ronnie drops out of frame behind the island.

relation_updates: Hostile relationship with Giles escalates to physical violence
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Injured and incapacitated by the assault

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kale discovers Ronnie's body, alerts his mom, and flees from Giles, who emerges from the shadows; Kale throws a trophy and runs out the back door with Giles in pursuit.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Deceased victim discovered in kitchen
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kale finds Ronnie's body in the kitchen
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ronnie's body is in the kitchen after discovery
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Ronnie died is not shown in this scene
evidence_quotes: sees Ronnie's body
KALE Ronnie

relation_updates: Relationship with Giles culminates in fatality
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Victim whose death is linked to Giles

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Julie impresses Ashley with her salesmanship, while Kale remains skeptical of the buyers; their intimate moment is interrupted by Ronnie, who silently films them, creating a tense, violating atmosphere.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Filming observer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ronnie, with a head bandage, silently films Kale and Ashley, intruding on their moment.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ronnie is alive, injured, and actively filming Kale and Ashley.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ronnie's motives for filming and the extent of his head injury.
evidence_quotes: 'I'm not even here,' he says with eerie calm,

relation_updates: Tense and violating interaction with Kale and Ashley due to filming
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Continues to film despite head trauma.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ronnie returns from a trip and reconnects with his friend Kale, becoming involved in Kale's neighborhood surveillance. He escalates from skeptical observer to active participant in investigating a neighbor, leading to dangerous break-ins and a violent attack. His arc includes moments of humor, moral conflict, and an ambiguous fate with post-event appearances.
